metaDescription.en: Contact Hrescic — book a demo or ask a question.
metaDescription.hr: Kontaktirajte Hrescic — rezervirajte demo ili postavite pitanje.

subheading.en: Whether you're ready to move forward or just exploring your options, we'll meet you there.
subheading.hr: Bilo da ste spremni krenuti naprijed ili samo istražujete opcije.

panelDescription.en: Tell us a bit about your business and we'll tailor the call to what matters. No pitch, just clarity.
panelDescription.hr: Recite nam nešto o svom poslovanju i prilagodit ćemo poziv onome što je važno. Bez prodaje, samo jasnoća.

messageLabel.en: What would you like to improve?

successMessage.en: Thanks! We'll be in touch within 24 hours.
successMessage.hr: Hvala! Javit ćemo se u roku od 24 sata.

errorMessage.en: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errorMessage.hr: Nešto je pošlo po zlu. Molimo pokušajte ponovno.

noteText.en: No spam — we respect your inbox.
noteText.hr: Bez spama — poštujemo vašu pristiglu poštu.

panelDescription.en: No pressure and no sales pitch, just clarity on what makes sense for your brand.
panelDescription.hr: Bez pritiska i bez prodajnih govora, samo jasnoća o tome što ima smisla za vaš brend.

messageLabel.en: What do you need help with?

messagePlaceholder.en: Tell us what you're looking for...

successMessage.en: Question received! We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
successMessage.hr: Pitanje zaprimljeno! Javit ćemo vam se u roku od 24 sata.

errorMessage.en: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errorMessage.hr: Nešto je pošlo po zlu. Molimo pokušajte ponovno.

noteText.en: No spam — we respect your inbox.
noteText.hr: Bez spama — poštujemo vašu pristiglu poštu.

switchPrompt.en: Want to see how we can help?
switchPrompt.hr: Želite vidjeti kako vam možemo pomoći?

text.en: You'll get a reply within 24 hours.
text.hr: Dobit ćete odgovor u roku od 24 sata.

text.en: If there's a fit, we'll map next steps.
text.hr: Ako postoji uklapanje, mapirat ćemo sljedeće korake.
